title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game**
*2026*
Develop your character, fulfill quests, and shape history in 15th-century Bohemia.
![Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_95d9a6a4.png)

2. **The Resort**
*2027*
Manage a resort in paradise while making your guests happy.
![The Resort](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_7a2d17b0.jpg)

3. **Wingspan Pocket**
*2026*
Swiftly build and activate a row of colorful birds.
![Wingspan Pocket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_17e83641.jpg)

4. **Diables**
*2026*
A strategic eurogame of fire, timing, and crowd mastery.
![Diables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_c3a95e2e.jpg)

5. **Yonder**
*2026*
Fantasy worker placement with asymmetric workers building towns.
![Yonder](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_79d1a561.png)

6. **Galileo's Truth**
*2026*
Follow the steps of Galileo Galilei in this Euro-Style competitive game.
![Galileo's Truth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_83908fa9.png)

7. **Ringyō**
*2026*
A simultaneous worker placement game about sustainable forestry in feudal Japan.
![Ringyō](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_157f04b8.png)

8. **Container**
*2026*
Set prices as you produce, sell, and ship containers in a tight economic simulation.
![Container](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_e6da3b0c.jpg)

9. **Cyberpunk 2077: The Board Game**
*2027*
Team Up with characters from Cyberpunk and make it to the Major Leagues of Night City
![Cyberpunk 2077: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_f368c095.jpg)

10. **The Isle of Penguins**
*2027*
Rescue as many penguins as you can before the ice melts and their home is lost.
![The Isle of Penguins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_ac33b41f.jpg)

11. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_5300384e.jpg)

12. **dnup**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_8d9d5e20.jpg)

13. **Politik**
*2026*
Nations compete for military, political and corporate control of a fallen world.
![Politik](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_be190219.jpg)

14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_4407f42d.jpg)

15. **Duel of Meloch**
*2026*
Scythe vs Expeditions: Clash head-to-head on a tight map in a race to victory.
![Duel of Meloch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_8ce6cfd4.png)

16. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_730fd522.jpg)

17. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_ecb59c46.png)

18. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_20e5860e.jpg)

19. **Darwin's Journey**
*2023*
Retrace Darwin’s journey to the Galapagos in a worker-placement adventure.
![Darwin's Journey](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_32ca4759.png)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_81abd7d0.png)

21. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_8a662d7b.jpg)

22. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_f2fb08a8.jpg)

23. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_39788201.jpg)

24. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_ea52fcff.jpg)

25. **Quickdraw: Battle for Silver City**
*2026*
The Law is caught in a tense shootout with Bandits in this asymmetric squad builder.
![Quickdraw: Battle for Silver City](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_54a56c64.png)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*18 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_b687a285.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*26 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_226216b4.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*21 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_d5f1c34d.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*54 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_53e51dc0.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*90 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_265bd8f9.jpg)

6. **Azul**
*104 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_43361b7f.png)

7. **Bomb Busters**
*14 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_a984c1f0.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*117 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_8a906da4.jpg)

9. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*36 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_381f091b.jpg)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*43 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_e00bf5ad.jpg)

11. **Faraway**
*26 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_24028a06.png)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*33 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_6b8376db.jpg)

13. **Cascadia**
*59 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_870784a7.jpg)

14. **dnup**
*1 months on the list*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_3fb613d5.jpg)

15. **Sky Team**
*33 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_a8eb07fc.jpg)

16. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2 months on the list*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_33d9e7da.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
*5 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_dce5157f.jpg)

18. **The Gang**
*12 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_70a8793b.jpg)

19. **Magical Athlete**
*5 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_4063ac6b.png)

20. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*66 months on the list*

![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_75500eb1.jpg)

21. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**

Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_56bdc9fa.jpg)

Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!

23. **Carcassonne**
*276 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-09/toplist/bgg_a46277b9.jpg)

24. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*12 months on the list*
